title: vitis yuenlingensis
intro: Vitis yuenlingensis, also known as the Chinese grapevine or Yuenlingensis, is a type of vine native to China that belongs to the Vitaceae family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Vitis yuenlingensis include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and aiding in the treatment of various diseases such as diabetes and cardiovascular disorders. Vitis yuenlingensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to make medicinal products, but more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses and effects.
